data.message: Ticket-17 risk-backtest pilot product changes were reconciled byte-for-byte into the canonical SSD repository at commit d6049e092b90a7a786330bab95c85a368c866deb/tree 26862440cb5a96860f32f1b4217e4d1660bf5e26; all 67 FAST tests passed, touched C++ formatting passed, strict Project OS verification passed, and both milestone and canonical recovery branches have exact remote commit/tree readback.

Vault-native OptionMetrics adapter completed on local commit 68c98358497421ecf185d668f214987ca9bbb055 and exact tree ce52c85d6c7f1d2599b2f99145b1ebc16f243119; published as remote commit 72494872617d0fff999950be8dd0773f9f4ae161 on portfolio-os/quant-vault-adapter-20260710 with the same tree and parent 7821ed6526a6e6a95f1c91ac62f12afdf317af94. Release build succeeded; all 68 FAST tests passed with one intentional skip; new adapter/test ruff checks and data-policy/docs gates passed. Bounded live smoke for 2020-03-16 bound five ok source-manifest items and returned 6416 eligible calls with one spot row, one dividend row, and 45 curve points without logging rows or market values. Frozen panel metadata preflight found all 40 required manifest-bound partitions across eight unique input dates. The memory-heavy empirical run was not started.

data.message: Add macOS xcrun to the existing supervised validator descendant allowlists. The first canonical strict replay showed xcrun as the sole containment violation while configure, build, all 68 FAST tests, formatting, data policy, and docs checks passed; the exact replay then passed containment and all commands.
data.rationale: xcrun is the Apple toolchain dispatcher invoked by CMake and does not broaden authority beyond local build validation

next: When the portfolio memory slot is released, begin a new high-risk goal to execute locked wrds_panel_calm_stress_v1 into ignored local outputs, verify every source receipt, compare Heston/BS and risk baselines, and promote only reviewed public-safe aggregates.
data.summary: Successful pilot changes and the fail-closed manifest-bound OptionMetrics vault adapter are reconciled into the canonical SSD recovery branch and strictly verified. A real one-date adapter smoke and full frozen-panel partition preflight passed. The prestigious multi-date empirical validation remains intentionally unexecuted under the portfolio memory-heavy-job gate, so no real-market performance claim is made.
